text:
Get the FREE App

Get the FREE App

Planning to get away from your winter blues?

Well, here’s your sign and a chance to do it on the cheap!

Click Frenzy Travel is launching Wednesday at 5pm WST and offering can’t-miss deals, including discounted flights to Paris.

The sale — which will run until 10pm on August 10 — features the best travel providers and their deals across all the major travel categories including flights, accommodation, destination packages, cruises, experiences, tours, and luggage and accessories.

Notable brands offering top travel deals include Jetstar, Celebrity Cruises, RedBalloon, G Adventures, Expedia, Malaysia Airlines, Qatar Airways, Wendy Wu Tours, Oaks Hotels, Greyhound Australia and Scoopon.

Click Frenzy Head of Marketing Daniel Thompson said Australians are cutting costs across the board but surprisingly “travel isn’t one of them”.

“Aussies are prioritising taking trips — whether local or international — because they’re craving that element of fun and escapism in their lives,” he said.

“We’re thrilled to be bringing back some amazing travel deals to Australians with another sale this year. We have you covered, from incredible international flight deals to discounts at top-notch local hotels.”

TOP-FLIGHT DEALS:

●Qatar Airways: 12 per cent off flights to Paris and other European destinations

●Jetstar: Fly to Japan and Return for FREE

TOP-CRUISE DEALS:

●Norwegian Cruise Lines: Save up to $2,500 off Cruises to Europe, Hawaii, Asia and more!

●Celebrity Cruises: Save up to 75 per cent Off Second Guest, and additional savings of up to $300 per room

● Quark Expeditions 40 per cent off select Arctic and Antarctic voyages to Canadian Arctic to Greenland to Svalbard

TOP EXPERIENCES & PACKAGE DEALS:

●G Adventures: 25 per cent off select tours in South Africa, Argentina and Cambodia

● G Adventures: 15 per cent off select tours in Vietnam, Maldives, Costa Rica, Mexico + MORE

● RedBalloon: Take an extra 5 per cent off sitewide

● Halong Tours: 65 per cent off tour of Vietnam

● Scoopon: $399 all-inclusive Bali packages for 7 nights with 2 adults

● Scoopon: $499 all-inclusive Thailand packages for 5 nights with 2 adults

● Klook: 30 per cent off tours to Bali

● Klook: 20 per cent off USA tours, including the Hollywood Sign, Kualoa Ranch and more

● Klook: 20 per cent off tours to Japan, including bar crawls, Mount Fuji and street go-karting

TOP ACCOMMODATION DEALS:

● Oaks Hotels: 30 per cent off 2-night stay across 55 Australian & NZ locations

● AUS Weekend Escape: 30 per cent off 20 hotels nationwide

●Scoopon: Australia deals from $269 for 2 nights for 2 adults save up to 69 per cent

● Klook: Up to 20 per cent off Japan and Bali Hotels and Resorts

● GrabOne: Up to 60 per cent Off Hotels, NZ stay at Cordis Hotel, Hammer Spring Hotels, Mercure Hotel and more!

TOP TRANSPORTATION DEALS:

● Jucy: 50 per cent off all cars and campervan rentals

● Greyhound Australia: 20 per cent off all tickets

TOP TRAVEL ACCESSORY DEALS:

●SENNHEISER: Up to 50 per cent off Sennheiser Travel Headphones
title: Click Frenzy Travel sale: Olympics making you want to go to Paris? HUGE deals on travel kick off tonight | PerthNow
description: Click Frenzy Travel is launching Wednesday at 5pm WST and offering can’t-miss deals, including discounted flights to Paris.
